name: Имя Фамилия
headline: Content Manager · Technical Writer · Process Automation

profile.all: Опыт в контент-менеджменте, стандартизации и автоматизации редакционных процессов. Фокус на качестве контента, снижении рутины и внедрении инструментов проверки и единообразия. Работа с большими объёмами публикаций (50–70 в день), кросс-функциональными командами и сжатыми сроками. Инициирую и веду проекты по автоматизации: от сбора требований до внедрения и поддержки инструментов.

keyImpact: Сократил ручной труд по форматированию и проверке ссылок на 30–40+ часов в месяц за счёт внутренних инструментов (Tardigrade, Axolotl Pro).
Внедрил пре-публикационную проверку ссылок и справочников, что устранило дубликаты и 404 после выхода материалов в прод.
Унифицировал правила оформления и проверки контента на 15+ сайтах, снизив количество правок после публикации.

experience.title: Senior Content Manager
experience.summary: Lead content operations, standardization, and tooling for multi-site editorial workflows.

bullets.text: Own content quality and formatting standards across 15+ WordPress sites and 50–70 daily publications; define and document guidelines for editors and external contributors.
Designed and deployed internal tools (Tardigrade, Axolotl Pro) for content standardization and link QA; maintain and iterate based on editorial feedback.
Reduced manual formatting and link-checking workload by 30–40+ hours per month through automation and pre-publication checks.
Collaborate with product, engineering, and editorial teams to align processes, priorities, and release deadlines.
Conduct training sessions and create runbooks for new tools and workflows.

experience.title: Content Manager
experience.summary: Produced and coordinated content for IT events and educational initiatives.

bullets.text: Coordinated content production for IT conferences and educational events; managed timelines and deliverables across multiple stakeholders.
Worked with internal teams and subject matter experts to prepare materials for publication; edited and structured technical content for diverse audiences.
Maintained content quality and delivery coordination under tight timelines; identified bottlenecks and proposed process improvements.

experience.title: Editor
experience.summary: Edited and published technical documentation and user-facing materials.

bullets.text: Edited and standardized documentation across multiple products and channels; ensured consistency in tone, structure, and terminology.
Set up style guides and templates for consistent output and faster turnaround; trained writers on guidelines and best practices.
Participated in content audits and migration projects; mapped legacy content to new structure and updated references.

experience.title: Junior Editor
experience.summary: Supported editorial and content production for web and print.

bullets.text: Prepared and proofread articles, newsletters, and marketing copy; checked facts and formatting against house style.
Assisted with CMS updates and content migration projects; coordinated with developers on technical constraints and workflows.

experience.title: Content Intern
experience.summary: Entry-level role in content and editorial support.

bullets.text: Supported senior editors with research, fact-checking, and draft edits for online and print publications.
Helped maintain editorial calendars and track content status across channels.

education: Public Relations Specialist Degree - Saint Petersburg State Institute of Film and Television (formerly SPbGUKIT)
Additional courses: Technical Writing, Project Management Basics, Documentation for Developers
projects: Designed and deployed Tardigrade, an internal content standardization tool that eliminated recurring formatting errors across 15 WordPress sites (50-70 publications/day) and reduced repetitive manual workload by 30-40+ hours per month. The tool enforces structure and style rules before publication and is used daily by the editorial team.

Built and rolled out Axolotl Pro, a pre-publication link QA and reference automation tool that shifted outbound link validation from manual checking to automated verification, reducing editorial link-checking workload by 15-25 hours per month and preventing duplicate/404 issues before release. Integrated with existing CMS and editorial workflow.

Developed lightweight workflow automation (Google Docs script + CMS improvements) to automate recurring formatting and publishing steps, saving ~2 hours daily in content operations. Scripts handle batch updates, validation, and reporting.
Introduced style and structure checks into the editorial pipeline to catch inconsistencies before publication; documented rules and trained the team on using the new checks.
Led a pilot to unify terminology and reference formats across product documentation; created a shared glossary and updated templates for future content.
